steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage pivots from describing Highwaymen paintings to asserting that they 'played a role in shaping popular perceptions of the state.' The main purpose centers on that broader cultural claim.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — a single painting's underappreciated influence: the passage is about the group's collective impact, not one overlooked work. ✗
  • Choice B — Highwaymen paintings helped shape widespread impressions of Florida: matches the art historians' claim and the passage's central argument. ✓
  • Choice C — a resurgence in popularity: the passage does not focus on a comeback or renewed interest. ✗
  • Choice D — contrasting reactions over time: the passage does not compare early versus later reception. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
